unknown.defaultBehavior: Show age verification before cigar/tobacco content is available.

over21.defaultBehavior: Use the planned over-21 route map.
over21.contentVisibility: Full over-21 Velarro flow, subject to auth and commerce rules.

under21.contentVisibility: No cigar, tobacco, humidor, PDP, cart, checkout, or tobacco editorial content.

routeVisibilityRules.notes: Root route is the dual-flow decision point.
Requires review for tobacco marketing content before under-21 visibility.
Route-backed auth overlays must not bypass age gates.
Some non-tobacco accessories may be brand-safe, but PR-0 does not approve exposure.
Curated premium collection presumed age-restricted until legal approves otherwise.
Under-21 state must not reach checkout or purchase surfaces.
May contain brand and business content; screen-by-screen content review required.
Legal/accessibility pages should remain available if they avoid tobacco promotion.
Brand/info pages require review for tobacco marketing language and imagery.

mustBlock: tobacco marketing metadata and social previews
mustReview: blurred background imagery in the under-21 age gate

seoAndAnswerSurfaceRules.pr0: Planning only. No metadata, schema, robots, sitemap, answer-engine, or security code changes.
requirements: Do not expose under-21 users to tobacco marketing snippets.
Do not emit tobacco product JSON-LD for under-21 state.
Confirm indexability rules with product/legal before implementation.

acceptanceGatesBeforeImplementation: Implementation approval phrase from AGENTS.md is provided before any production code.
Under-21 route and content blocking rules are approved by product/legal.
First implementation target has complete Figma section specs or approved manual fallbacks.
Required validation commands pass on PR-0.
